project_type: Full-stack AI productivity app: Next.js 15 + React 19 frontend, Python FastAPI backend with Vertex AI Gemini, MCP servers for Google Calendar/Tasks/Gmail, Firestore persistence
build_system: npm for frontend, pip for backend, pnpm-lock.yaml present but npm works
test_framework: Jest with @testing-library/react for frontend (jest --passWithNoTests), pytest for backend
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm run build && npm run lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm run build' - must succeed with no errors. 2. Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm run lint' - must have no errors. 3. Run 'python3 -m py_compile /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend/app/main.py' - must succeed.
setup_instructions: Frontend: cd frontend && npm install. Backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt. Python 3.9+ available via python3.
environment_constraints: python3 is available (3.9.25). Node/npm available. No Docker daemon confirmed yet. Network access available for npm packages.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT modify: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, components/Providers.tsx, components/entity/, shared/. CAN modify: All frontend app/ and components/ (except above), all backend/ files, mcp-servers/ if needed, lib/api-extended.ts.
key_patterns: Frontend: 'use client' components, framer-motion animations, @dnd-kit for drag-drop, date-fns for dates, lucide-react icons, AIContextProvider for AI awareness with reportAction(), localStorage for state persistence, CSS variables for dark mode styling. Backend: FastAPI endpoints with auth_token pattern, MCP client for Google API access, Gemini for AI, Pydantic models for request validation.
directory_structure: frontend/app/dashboard/ - page routes (tasks, calendar, settings, habits). frontend/components/ - reusable components (ui/, ai/, chat/, layout/, voice/). frontend/lib/ - API helpers, date utils. frontend/hooks/ - custom hooks (DO NOT MODIFY). backend/app/ - FastAPI main + agents/ + api/ + db/ + mcp/ + utils/. mcp-servers/ - Google Calendar, Tasks, Gmail MCP server implementations.
